summary: MASN 24/7 feed video error during playback
description:
GIVEN a user has entitlements for MASN
AND the user launches the MLB.tv Core App
AND the user logs in

*NOTE:* 
MASN entitlement = MASN_110
This will need to be tested on a Chrome browser using DevTools

MASN Test users:

|Username|Password|
|masn@gmail.com|Password4MASN|
|masnims@gmail.com (In Market)|Password4MASN|
|masnoom@gmail.com (Out of Market)|Password4MASN|
|masnintl@gmail.com (International)|Password4MASN|

steps.action:
WHEN the user is on the MASN page
AND the user selects the "Watch Live" button in the Hero
AND lets the feed playback for a few moments
AND network requests to "tve-live.mlb.com" are blocked via Chrome DevTools
steps.result:
THEN playback of the 24/7 MASN feed is interrupted
AND a Video Error modal displays with a "Go Back" button
AND the "Go Back" button navigates the user back to the SNY page
